name: create_task_chain
description: Skill 7: Create a Datasphere Task Chain (TC_) that executes an existing Transformation Flow (TF_). Generates a taskchains CSN with a START node and a TASK node (applicationId=TRANSFORMATION_FLOWS, activity=EXECUTE). Name is derived as TC_<TF_NAME> to ensure 1:1 traceability. Dry-run by default; set deploy=true to create in Datasphere.

tf_name.description: Technical name of the Transformation Flow to execute (must start with TF_). Example: TF_BILLING_DOC_JOINED.

space_id.description: Datasphere space ID containing the Transformation Flow.

tc_name.description: Override the generated Task Chain name (must start with TC_). Default: TC_<tf_name>.

folder.description: Optional folder assignment written into _meta.dependencies.folderAssignment. Omit to exclude _meta entirely.

deploy.description: Set true to deploy to Datasphere. Requires confirm and acknowledge_ai.

confirm.description: Human confirmation flag. Must be true when deploy=true.

acknowledge_ai.description: AI literacy acknowledgement. Must be true when deploy=true.
